languages.text: "Что за вздор! Очевидно, что протекторат распался бы, не прими я власть".
"What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."
languages.original_text: "Что за вздор! Очевидно, что протекторат распался бы, не прими я власть".

traits.locale_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."
"What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."
"What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."
"What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

languages.text: «¡Pamplinas! Es evidente que el protectorado se habría desmoronado si no hubiese asumido yo el mando».
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: «¡Pamplinas! Es evidente que el protectorado se habría desmoronado si no hubiese asumido yo el mando».

languages.text: “一派胡言！谁都能看出来，若不是我来接管，这片属地早就垮了。”
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: “一派胡言！谁都能看出来，若不是我来接管，这片属地早就垮了。”

languages.text: « Dites-moi que je rêve ! Il est évident que le protectorat se serait effondré si je n'avais pas pris les choses en main. »
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: « Dites-moi que je rêve ! Il est évident que le protectorat se serait effondré si je n'avais pas pris les choses en main. »

languages.text: "Saçmalık! Ben komutayı devralmasaydım protektoranın çökeceği çok açıktı."
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık! Ben komutayı devralmasaydım protektoranın çökeceği çok açıktı."

languages.text: 「何を言っているんだ！私が指揮を執らなかったら、保護国は崩壊していたに違いない。」
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: 「何を言っているんだ！私が指揮を執らなかったら、保護国は崩壊していたに違いない。」

languages.text: "Was für ein Unsinn! Es ist offensichtlich, dass das Protektorat zerfallen wäre, wenn ich nicht das Kommando übernommen hätte.
languages.original_text: "What nonsense! It is obvious the protectorate would have crumbled had I not assumed command."

traits.locale_text: "Was für ein Unsinn! Es ist offensichtlich, dass das Protektorat zerfallen wäre, wenn ich nicht das Kommando übernommen hätte.
